user.title: Rig for Red
user.description: Configure the Submarine Night Mode for your lights.

data_description.lights: Choose the lights that should switch to red during submarine night mode.
data_description.schedule_days: Select the weekdays on which the night mode schedule should activate.
data_description.schedule_time: The time at which the lights should start dimming to red.
data_description.dim_duration_minutes: How long the dimming transition from white to red should take.
data_description.restore_at_sunrise: If enabled, lights will restore to white at sunrise instead of a fixed time.
data_description.restore_time: If not restoring at sunrise, set a fixed time to restore white lighting.
data_description.adaptive_lighting_switches: Optional Adaptive Lighting switches to temporarily disable during red mode.
data_description.min_brightness_pct: The minimum brightness level at the end of the dimming transition.

error.lights_required: Please select at least one light.
error.restore_time_required: Please provide a restore time when not restoring at sunrise.
error.entity_not_found: One or more lights were not found.
